raw_consumer_statement:
Citi/Best Buy Dispute for the AMOUNT of {$250.00} Since XX/XX/XXXXXXXX   Past the 90 days without proper investigation. 

I am writing to formally report a violation of the Fair Credit Billing Act ( 15 U.S.C. 1666 ) by Citibank regarding a {$250.00} charge on my Best Buy account for " XXXX XXXX '' passes. 

The basis of this dispute is a service failure. I paid a premium for expedited access ; however, the park was so significantly over-capacity that " XXXX XXXX '' wait times exceeded one hour, defeating the purpose of the purchase. 

I have acted in good faith to resolve this. Detailed explanations and the merchant receipt were sent via Certified Mail and delivered on XX/XX/XXXX. Despite this proof of delivery, Citibank has closed the case twice without a reasonable investigation. I continue to receive automated letters, and subsequent notices requesting information that has already been provided. 

Furthermore, it has been over 90 days since my initial dispute. Citibank/Best Buy has failed to resolve this error or provide the mandatory documentary evidence of their investigation as required by federal law. 

Due to these violations and the failure to provide the purchased service, I demand a full credit of {$250.00} to my account immediately.
